name: GoodData Analytics API
what_it_does: GoodData Cloud REST API for headless BI and embedded analytics. GoodData is developer-first analytics platform offering a comprehensive API and SDK for programmatic access to workspaces, metrics, dashboards, and data. Enables AI agents to execute MAQL (GoodData query language) queries, manage semantic layer, and retrieve analytics results.
use_cases: Executing GoodData analytics queries from business intelligence automation agents
Managing GoodData workspaces and data sources from analytics admin agents
Retrieving metric results and dashboard data from reporting automation agents
Embedding analytics capabilities into products via GoodData API from developer agents
not_for: Simple dashboards without programmatic requirements (GoodData is developer-first)
best_when: A developer or analytics team using GoodData wants AI agents to query analytics data programmatically — GoodData's comprehensive API makes it well-suited for agent-driven analytics.
avoid_when: You need a business-user-focused BI tool (GoodData is more complex and developer-oriented). Enterprise pricing commitment required.

auth.notes: GoodData API token authentication. Tokens generated per user in GoodData Cloud. Service accounts recommended for agent access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: GoodData Community (free, limited); Trial available for Cloud
pricing.paid_tiers: GoodData Cloud pricing based on usage and workspaces
pricing.notes: GoodData offers a community edition and trial. Cloud pricing requires sales engagement for production use.

performance.rate_limits: GoodData API rate limits depend on plan

known_agent_gotchas: MAQL (GoodData query language) is proprietary — agents need to learn GoodData concepts
No public MCP server — REST API or SDK integration required
GoodData semantic layer model must be understood for correct query construction
Developer-first platform — more complex setup than business-user BI tools
Python SDK available and recommended for agent integration over raw REST API
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise analytics data. SOC2 and GDPR. API token auth. EU and US data residency. Service accounts for agent access.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise analytics data. SOC2 and GDPR. API token. Data residency options in EU and US.
